com.mentor.chs.api.query

Interface IXReportProcessor

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConnectivityProcessor, IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXExtendedReportProcessor

    public interface IXReportProcessor
extends IXConnectivityProcessor
    Report processors decide how entities queried for in reports are related to those returned by the scoping queries. A custom processsor for report generation can implement this interface to define how query results from scoping queries are related to entities queried for in reports.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getName()
      Name to identify the processor
      java.util.Collection<? extends IXObject> getRelatedObjects(java.lang.String targetEntityName, java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> targetEntityClass, java.util.Collection<? extends IXObject> inputSet, java.lang.String context)
      A report when reporting on data corresponding to target entity type (defined by targetEntityName,targetEntityClass) would use this function to decide how query result are related to target entity type Implementations this function return target entity types that are related to inputSet.
      void setUsePlugin(java.lang.String pluginName)
      customize the behavior of the report processor with a plugin reference.(see IXReportProcessorPlugin)

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.query.IXConnectivityProcessor

        flushCache

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Name to identify the processor
        Specified by:
        getName in interface IXConnectivityProcessor
        Specified by:
        getName in interface IXPlugin
        Returns:
        Name to identify the processor

      • setUsePlugin

        void setUsePlugin(java.lang.String pluginName)
        customize the behavior of the report processor with a plugin reference.(see IXReportProcessorPlugin)
        Specified by:
        setUsePlugin in interface IXConnectivityProcessor
        Parameters:
        pluginName - The name of the plugin to use.

      • getRelatedObjects

        java.util.Collection<? extends IXObject> getRelatedObjects(java.lang.String targetEntityName,
                                                           java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> targetEntityClass,
                                                           java.util.Collection<? extends IXObject> inputSet,
                                                           java.lang.String context)
        A report when reporting on data corresponding to target entity type (defined by targetEntityName,targetEntityClass) would use this function to decide how query result are related to target entity type Implementations this function return target entity types that are related to inputSet.
        Specified by:
        getRelatedObjects in interface IXConnectivityProcessor
        Parameters:
        targetEntityName - -- target entity name
        targetEntityClass - -- target entity class
        inputSet - -- collection of extensibility objects whose related objects we are interested in.
        context - -- This is passed from the report definition ( see query tags) as a hint to processor to evaluate based on context.
        Returns:
        collection of extensibility objects of class targetEntityClass
